texto: Let there be no scales to weigh your un-known treasure
autor: And seek not the depths of your knowledge with staff or sounding line.For self is a sea boundless and measureless.
explicacao: Citação de And seek not the depths of your knowledge with staff or sounding line.For self is a sea boundless and measureless. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Let there be no scales to weigh your un-known treasure” articula reflexao, kahlil-gibran, the-prophet em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como the-prophet.
